privileged_info_summary: The Vermont SERC audit of Lakeside Chemical Supply (facility at 330 Reservoir Road, Montpelier, VT) identifies four specific data quality corrections required in CAMEO: (1) Hydrogen Peroxide (CAS 7722-84-1) average amount must be corrected from 8,500 lbs to 4,200 lbs with amount code '04', (2) Sulfuric Acid (CAS 7664-93-9) storage location must be updated from 'Chemical Storage A' to 'Drum Storage Building B', (3) Emergency contact David Nguyen must be replaced with Patricia Okonkwo (phone 802-555-0293, titles: Fac. Emergency Coordinator and Emergency Contact), and (4) Fire district must be updated from 'Station 4 - Montpelier South' to 'Station 12 - Montpelier Central'.
